questions: What do you usually eat for breakfast?
How do you travel to school or work?
What do you like to do at the weekend?

questions.prompt: Describe the picture, then answer two questions.

questions: Tell me about a time you ate a meal outdoors.
Do you prefer eating at home or outside in nature? Why?

questions.prompt: Compare the two pictures, then answer two questions.

questions: Describe and compare the two pictures.
Which type of exercise would you prefer? Why?
Why do you think some people prefer exercising outdoors while others prefer a gym?

questions.prompt: You will talk about one topic for two minutes. You have one minute to prepare.

questions: Tell me about a time you set yourself a difficult physical challenge.
How did you feel while you were doing it?
Why do you think some people enjoy pushing themselves to achieve difficult goals?
